caption: A close-up shot focuses on the engine and drivetrain of a motorized vehicle, likely a scooter or small motorcycle. The scene is filled with mechanical components, including a metal engine casing, a drive belt or chain, and various bolts and wires. A light-colored plastic cover on the right side of the engine features embossed lettering, although only partial characters are legible. A small white sticker is visible on a metallic part of the engine, containing a barcode and some alphanumeric text. A dark metal frame surrounds the machinery, and a brown tubular pipe runs along the top of the frame. Across the frames, the scene remains static with no people present and no visible movement or change in the position of the equipment, maintaining a consistent view of the greasy, weathered mechanical parts.
